Chronology of every recorded fact about [[City of Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin calls for power from the City of Light.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The City of Light is the scale of Alin's massive Elysian Gate.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The City of Light has nine Districts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The City of Light is a location where graves are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Enosh was divided into nine districts in imitation of the City of Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The City of Light is a faction that fights the House of Blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — The Incarnations will assault the City of Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The City of Light is associated with Elysia.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
